criteria.name: code_change_described
criteria.signal: describes a code change, diff, implementation, or refactor

criteria.name: file_identified
criteria.signal: names a specific file, path, module, or component

criteria.name: test_mentioned
criteria.signal: mentions a test, spec, unit test, or test coverage

criteria.name: no_regression_noted
criteria.signal: notes that existing behaviour is preserved or no regression introduced
